## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy shift: Broaden topics while maintaining focus on non-desk workers and target industries](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Cannibalization issues identified; plan to consolidate competing pages and improve internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [New approach to content generation implemented; team to review and publish revised articles quickly](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Agreement to discuss sales process and lead journey in next week's meeting to identify gaps and create targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Adjustment

  - [Issue: Non-desk keyword focus limiting search visibility for broader terms](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Solution: Broaden content topics while maintaining relevance to target industries](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Approach:](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Use general terms in titles (e.g., "incentive compensation tips")](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Include sections specific to non-desk workers and target industries within content](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Balance between broad appeal and ICP-focused information](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Overall performance stable; slight dip in new content performance](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Customer survey cluster showing decreased performance](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Plan to create more content for underperforming clusters](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Discussion on starting new clusters with 5-7 articles to test performance before full expansion](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### Cannibalization Report and Tool

  - [New dashboard created to identify competing pages for keywords](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [Shows landing page count and average position for keywords](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [Example: "How to send mass text to employees" competing with similar content](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [Action: Consolidate competing pages, improve internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)

### Share of Voice (SOV) Measurement

  - [Current SOV data from SEMrush not considered highly accurate](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2385.0)
  - [Discussion on possibility of tracking SOV for specific important keywords](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2385.0)
  - [Jessica to provide list of key keywords for manual SOV tracking (e.g., "employee texting", "employee texting platform")](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2478.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [10 articles regenerated with new approach, ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2537.0)
  - [Team to expedite review process to publish by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2543.0)
  - [Additional 10 articles to be ready by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessica to review regenerated content ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2543.0)
  - [Sadira to start consolidating pages with cannibalization issues, beginning with keywords having the most landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2496.0)
  - [Team to implement new content strategy balancing broad appeal and ICP focus](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Jessica to provide list of key keywords for manual SOV tracking](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=2478.0)
  - [Prepare for next week's discussion on sales process and lead journey to identify content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of new content approach and adjust as necessary](https://fathom.video/share/3Vpz6shn2Qvyh-zuU6ALzKtZ_ySxRGXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
